serverInfo.title: Calypso Multimodal RAG MCP
serverInfo.description: Multimodal RAG for source-backed AI answers through the Calypso Responses API.

tools.name: calypso-rag-agent
tools.title: Calypso RAG Agent
tools.description: Query the Calypso RAG agent for grounded answers over the configured knowledge base. Use `/new` as the prompt to reset the current conversation and start a fresh thread. When `fileIds` are provided, the MCP uses `rag_policy` retrieval semantics for agent-store files.

prompt.description: Your request. Include context, constraints, and desired output.

fileIds.description: Optional uploaded agent-store `file_id` values to attach with retrieval-backed RAG semantics.

tools.name: calypso-upload-agent-file
tools.title: Calypso Upload Agent File
tools.description: Upload a file into the agent store and return a compatible OpenAI-style `file_id`. This tool sends `purpose=user_data`, targets the selected RAG agent with `target_model`, and can wait until the file is ready for `rag_policy` retrieval.

filename.description: Display filename for the uploaded file.

mimeType.description: Content type for the uploaded file.

contentBase64.description: Base64-encoded file content. Prefer this for Smithery and remote execution.

filePath.description: Local file path when the MCP process can read from disk.

targetModel.description: Optional RAG agent id. Defaults to `calypso-rag-agent`.

waitForReady.description: If true, wait until the uploaded file is RAG-ready before returning.

tools.name: calypso-upload-knowledge-file
tools.title: Calypso Upload Knowledge File
tools.description: Upload a file into the durable knowledge store and indexing pipeline. This tool returns knowledge-file and task metadata and should be used for corpus ingestion rather than direct per-turn chat attachment.

filename.description: Display filename for the uploaded knowledge file.

mimeType.description: Content type for the uploaded knowledge file.

contentBase64.description: Base64-encoded file content. Prefer this for Smithery and remote execution.

filePath.description: Local file path when the MCP process can read from disk.

title.description: Optional human-readable title stored with the knowledge file.

metadata.description: Optional metadata object serialized with the upload.

idempotencyKey.description: Optional idempotency key for durable upload retries.

waitForIndexing.description: If true, wait until indexing reaches a terminal ready state before returning.
